name: Public joint stock company FAR-EASTERN ENERGY COMPANY
summary: Public joint stock company FAR-EASTERN ENERGY COMPANY supplies electricity to individuals and enterprises in Russia. It purchases and sells electricity in the wholesale market. The company serves individuals and corporate customers in the territory of Primorsky Krai, Khabarovsk region, Amur region, and Jewish autonomous region. The company is based in Vladivostok, Russia. Public joint stock company FAR-EASTERN ENERGY COMPANY operates as a subsidiary of Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Hydro-Generating Company - RusHydro.
